description: The 'Ndrina Pino is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cosenza, Calabria, Italy. It was historically allied with the Sena family and later merged into the Perna clan after a feud in the 1980s. The clan was led by Franco Pino, who became a pentito in 1995. It engaged in drug trafficking, arms possession, and international criminal activities, including involvement in the construction of Bucharest airport in Romania.

country_links.evidence_quote: l'aggiudicamento della costruzione dell'aeroporto di Bucarest in Romania
country_links.context: The organization was involved in securing the construction contract for Bucharest airport in Romania.
